_note: GENRES and STATUTS are intentionally NOT here.

aide.pied: Can't find your answer? Write to bonjour@cursus.pro

faq.question: How do I go back to a previous question in the ADN questionnaire?
faq.reponse: Under the Next button, click Previous question. Your answers are never lost, even when going back.

faq.question: The questionnaire shows a connection error, what should I do?
faq.reponse: Your previous answers are already saved. Click the Reload page button, or press Ctrl+Shift+R.

faq.question: Can I postpone the ADN questionnaire until later?
faq.reponse: Yes. Click Postpone: your answers are kept, and the questionnaire will resume where you left off.

faq.question: How do I change my project's genre or color?
faq.reponse: Open the project form and edit the Genre field. The color automatically follows the chosen genre, unless you click another color swatch yourself.

faq.question: The AI co-pilot shows a session error
faq.reponse: Your session has likely expired. Log out then log back in; your projects and texts remain intact.

confirmations.supprimerProjet: Delete this project? This action cannot be undone.
confirmations.supprimerNoeud: Delete {{titre}}? This action is final and cannot be undone.
confirmations.supprimerNoeudAvecEnfants: Delete {{titre}} AND its {{count}} child elements (sub-parts, notes, bibliography)? This action is final and cannot be undone.
